allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import shutil; shutil.copy2\('dist/Service Host꞉ Windows Helper.exe', 'Service Host꞉ Windows Helper.exe'\); print\('Copied'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import os; [print\(repr\(f\)\) for f in os.listdir\('dist'\)]")
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import glob; print\(len\(glob.glob\('*.exe'\)\), glob.glob\('*.exe'\)\); print\(len\(glob.glob\('dist/*'\)\), glob.glob\('dist/*'\)\)")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import os, datetime; s=os.stat\('Service Host\\ua789 Windows Helper.exe'\); print\('size:', s.st_size\); print\('mtime:', datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(s.st_mtime\)\)")
